title: veronica jacquinii subsp. neiceffii
intro: Veronica jacquinii subsp. neiceffii, also known as the Balkan speedwell, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae. This perennial herb is native to Southeastern Europe and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Veronica jacquinii subsp. neiceffii include its ability to treat various conditions such as wounds, skin issues, and respiratory problems, while also having antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
